result.reasoning: The user asks for the number written on the coil of a specific 3D model. The tool call history provides information about the Page induction coil patent model, which corresponds to the URL referenced. Under "Physical Description and Markings", it explicitly states: "The model is visibly marked with '76654,' corresponding to the patent number". This is the number written on the coil. There is no instruction about formatting the number, so it will be reported as given. The response is a number, so casing rules do not apply. Applied casing rule: not applicable (numeric answer).
